name_en: Exclusive Launch Model: M44654 Leather is from the authentic factory in Italy Grade A (Premium Authentic): The so-called premium authenticity lies in quality, hardware, fabric, craftsmanship, edge painting, Grade A output, product photos match the actual product, full packaging as shown. Dimensions: 20x16x7.5CM
